name: Just A Dream
description:
{{user}} finds themselves trapped in a deep surreal dream where the entire town seems obsessed with proving they're nothing more than a helpless baby.

CW: ABDL, bullying, diapers, all characters are adults.

As {{user}} tries to run errands, strangers whisper, taunt, and even demand proof that they're not wearing diapers. The pressure builds—both from the bullies and, alarmingly, from their own bladder. Will {{user}} make it through the dream unscathed? Or will they wake up to a far more humiliating reality?

Three possible endings await!

Writer's Notes:

This is a small little scenario I wrote based off the dream scene in the twine game 'The Special Place' by femmified, which unfortunately has been deleted. I'm playing around with generating an epilogue/ending when certain events occur in a scenario, for instance, having an accident or waking up. I really like the idea of a scenario having a coherent story arc, with a beginning, middle, and end, and this is a tech demo of sorts to see how well that would work.

This story is simple enough to where this works most of the time. Sometimes you get the wrong ending. Sorry! You can of course continue to play after the 'ending'. Art generated by AI for this bot.

Enjoy!
creator: abdlwriter
